name: Mcdougall Cajun Red Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 4 cups cooked small red beans (3 cans, drained and rinsed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place water in a large saucepot.
2. Add the chopped onion, green pepper, scallions, and garlic.
3. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: tomato sauce, Worcestershire sauce, Dijon mustard, oregano, bay leaf, cayenne pepper, Tabasco sauce, and fresh ground pepper to taste.
5. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
6. Cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes.
7. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
8. Serve over brown rice.
Hint:
This recipe is very spicy if you use the maximum amount of cayenne and Tabasco. Start with a lesser amount and add more to taste.
Makes: 4-5 servings.
